name: make
description: GNU make utility to maintain groups of programs

name: -C
--directory
options.description: Change to DIRECTORY before doing anything

name: -k
--keep-going
options.description: Keep going when some targets cannot be made

name: -n
--dry-run
options.description: Print the commands that would be executed, but do not execute them

name: --debug
options.description: Print various types of debugging information

name: -q
--question
options.description: Run no recipes; exit status says if up to date

name: -t
--touch
options.description: Touch targets instead of remaking them

name: --no-print-directory
options.description: Turn off -w, even if it was turned on implicitly

name: -l
--load-average
options.description: Do not start multiple jobs unless load is below N
